fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user ID that is used to filter the customers that are displayed in the My Customer Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer numbers that are displayed in the My Customer Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.

fields.name: Balance (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment amount that the customer owes for completed sales.
